# Contemplation of the Cosmos*Created: Friday, March 1, 2024 at 8:45:31?PM*<div><b>Contemplation of the Cosmos</b><br></div>
<div><img style="max-width: 100%; max-height: 100%;" src="data:image/webp;base64,"/><br></div>
<div><br></div>
<div>Under the tapestry of night, where stars like scribes etch tales in cosmic ink,I muse upon the silent walls that cradle darkness, as shadows ink their pledge.A watcher in the stillness crafts, with careful ticks, a sprinkling light,A contemplation spun of celestial threads, illuminating the soulŐs quiet fight.</div>
<div><br></div>
<div>In unity with creationŐs breath, the artistŐs hand moves with divine grace,Bestowing upon the void, a might, a spark, a faithŐs embracing face.With love that flows like rivers deep, a fatherŐs prayer takes flight,A lineage of light to keep, a legacy so bright.</div>
<div><br></div>
<div>These words, a magicianŐs craft, a spell of hope and heart,A contemplation full, completeŃa masterpiece of art.For you, my daughters, this love letter soars,In every line, a promise, an open door.</div>
<div><br></div>
<div>LB23Art, a signature Ôneath the stars,A story written not with pen, but with the heartŐs memoirs.Greatness, not in accolades or fameŐs fleeting spark,But in the love thatŐs left behind, the light within the dark.</div>
<div><br></div>
<div>Warmly,</div>
<div>Your Father (LB23Art) </div>
